Migration complete. Here's a summary of the changes:

**`TestProject.csproj`** — Replaced v2 packages (`xunit`, `xunit.runner.visualstudio`, `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk`) with `xunit.v3` 3.2.2 and added `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>` (v3 test projects are executables).

**`DatabaseSetupAttribute.cs`** — Updated namespace from `Xunit.Sdk` → `Xunit.v3` and added the new `IXunitTest test` parameter to `Before`/`After` method overrides.

**`global.json`** — Changed test runner from `"VSTest"` to `"Microsoft.Testing.Platform"`.
